label: Column chart
description: A vertical bar chart — categories along the x-axis, value up the y-axis. Drop-in preset that draws through the shared bar renderer with a vertical orientation.

params.label: Rows
params.description: One object per category; keys are the plotted fields.

params.label: Series
params.description: Which row keys to plot and their labels.

params.label: Orientation
params.description: Fixed to vertical for a column chart.
